inputs.label: Pressure (inHg)
inputs.businessContext: The measured pressure in inches of mercury.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor from inHg to psi (1 inHg = 0.491154 psi).

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the result.

inputs.label: Altitude (feet)
inputs.businessContext: Altitude above sea level, provided for informational context (not used in conversion).

inputs.label: Temperature (°F)
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of the mercury column, provided for informational context (not used in standard conversion).
